# Optivan (obt.tools)

> Optivan is a desktop application for design optimization of engineering simulations
> (MDO / PIDO category). Engineers wire design variables, simulation solvers, and objectives
> into a visual node graph, by hand or by asking the built-in agent, then run design of
> experiments and optimization across thousands of configurations and explore the results in
> a live post-processing dashboard. Native desktop app written in Rust for Windows, macOS,
> and Linux. Built by OBT Systems.

## What it does

- Visual node-graph optimization workflows: design variables, file/template mappers, Python,
  shell, MATLAB and Excel evaluator nodes, solver runners, objectives and constraints
- Works with existing simulation solvers that read text input decks and write result files
  (dynamic and structural FEA, CFD, and similar CAE codes), plus native binary result readers
- Design of experiments: Latin Hypercube, Sobol, full factorial, CCD, D-Optimal
- Optimizers: gradient (BFGS family), Nelder-Mead, simulated annealing, genetic algorithms,
  NSGA-II multi-objective, successive response surface method (SRSM), Bayesian / surrogate
  optimization, robust design / RBDO
- Post-processing: parallel coordinates, scatter matrices, response surfaces, convergence and
  Pareto views, live-updating during runs
- HPC: submit, monitor and cancel jobs on SLURM and LSF clusters over SSH
- Agent-driven setup: describe the study in plain language and the built-in agent builds the
  node graph, runs it, and surfaces the best designs

## Category and comparisons

Optivan is in the same product category as LS-OPT, modeFRONTIER, HEEDS, Isight, optiSLang,
and Dakota (process integration and design optimization, PIDO). Differences: it is a fast
native desktop app rather than a heavyweight suite, and it has an integrated LLM agent that
can build and run studies conversationally.

## Status and access

- Currently in free beta. Access: request a license at https://obt.tools (email + company),
  which issues a license key and download link
- Contact: via the request-access form at https://obt.tools

## Canonical URLs

- Home / product overview: https://obt.tools/
